ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the project ended */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "project_leader" INTEGER /* ID of the user who leads the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_leader FOREIGN KEY ("project_leader") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the source code file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the source code file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the file belongs to */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module the file is part of */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., C, Python) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the file */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the file */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric type */,
  "metric_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric category */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the metric */,
  "benchmark_value" REAL /* Benchmark value for the metric */,
  "anomaly_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the metric value is an anomaly */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_metric_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_type_id") REFERENCES metric_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_metric_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_category_id") REFERENCES metric_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_categories_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_categories_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the type is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the type */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_types_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_types_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_definitions" (
  "definition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric definition */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric category */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the metric */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the definition is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the definition */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the definition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("definition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_definitions_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES metric_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_definitions_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_definitions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES metric_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_definitions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_definitions_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, QA) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the account */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was successful */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent used for access */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the log */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
